ws2812_matrix_init.message0: initialize WS2812 RGB matrix %1 pin %2 width %3 height %4
ws2812_matrix_init.tooltip: Create and initialize a WS2812/NeoPixel RGB matrix with configurable size and serpentine wiring

ws2812_matrix_show.tooltip: Refresh the WS2812 matrix with the current buffer

ws2812_matrix_clear.tooltip: Turn off all pixels and optionally refresh immediately

ws2812_matrix_color_rgb.tooltip: Build a color value from red, green and blue components

ws2812_matrix_set_pixel_xy.tooltip: Set one pixel color by matrix coordinates

ws2812_matrix_set_pixel_index.tooltip: Set one LED color by linear index

ws2812_matrix_fill_color.tooltip: Fill the whole matrix buffer with one color

ws2812_matrix_draw_image.message0: %1 show RGB image %2 at X %3 Y %4 empty pixels %5
ws2812_matrix_draw_image.tooltip: Draw an image from the RGB matrix editor with optional transparent empty pixels

ws2812_matrix_draw_line.message0: %1 draw line X1 %2 Y1 %3 X2 %4 Y2 %5 color %6
ws2812_matrix_draw_line.tooltip: Draw a line into the matrix buffer

ws2812_matrix_draw_rect.message0: %1 draw rectangle X %2 Y %3 width %4 height %5 %6 color %7
ws2812_matrix_draw_rect.tooltip: Draw an outline or filled rectangle

ws2812_matrix_draw_circle.message0: %1 draw circle X %2 Y %3 radius %4 %5 color %6
ws2812_matrix_draw_circle.tooltip: Draw an outline or filled circle

ws2812_matrix_draw_text.tooltip: Draw 5x7 English letters, numbers and common symbols

ws2812_matrix_scroll_text.message0: %1 scroll text %2 color %3 background %4 delay ms %5
ws2812_matrix_scroll_text.tooltip: Scroll text from right to left

ws2812_matrix_color_wipe.tooltip: Light pixels one by one by LED index

ws2812_matrix_theater_chase.message0: %1 theater chase color %2 delay ms %3 cycles %4
ws2812_matrix_theater_chase.tooltip: Show a three-phase chasing light animation

ws2812_matrix_run_effect.message0: %1 run effect %2 color %3 delay ms %4 cycles %5

ws2812_matrix_xy_to_index.tooltip: Convert XY coordinates to an LED index using the current size and wiring

ws2812_matrix_get_count.tooltip: Get the total number of LEDs in the matrix
